title: graphi HTTP surface contract (SW-044)
description: Versioned Go<->TS single source of truth for the read-only HTTP REST + SSE surface. SchemaVersion is the ENVELOPE/contract version (versions the wire shape consumed by TS/web/TUI/VS Code clients); the engine EP-002 payload schema embedded verbatim inside `envelope.payload` is versioned independently. R5 drift-gate: the request header X-Graphi-Schema-Version is OPTIONAL; the response version stamp is MANDATORY.

x-status-taxonomy.405: mutating verb on a GET route (Go 1.22 method routing)
x-status-taxonomy.500: sanitized unexpected (code=internal; raw error logged locally, never returned)

envelope.description: Success data response. payload carries the engine canonical bytes verbatim, byte-identical to MCP/CLI output (parity by construction).

payload.description: EP-002 engine payload (typed by the engine's own schema).

errorEnvelope.description: The single error shape shared by every REST error response AND the SSE event:error frame.

message.description: Sanitized, client-safe message. NEVER a raw engine error string, stack trace, or filesystem path.

resources.description: Negotiable read resources: query/<op>, search, analyze/<analyzer>.

streams.description: SSE event types observable on /events (data + framing events).

sseFrame.description: Logical shape of one SSE frame on /events. On the wire it is encoded as the lines `event: <type>`, `id: <monotonic per-connection seq>`, `data: <json>`, followed by a blank line. The first frame is always event:ready stamping the schema_version; event:bye is the terminal completion frame; event:error carries an errorEnvelope.

event.description: Event type: a data event (e.g. ingest-completed) or a framing event (ready|bye|error).

data.description: event-specific JSON: {schema_version} for ready, {} for bye, errorEnvelope for error, observe.Event for data events.
